mismatchDiagnostics.note: Buckets apply only to subset-eligible rows (parsable gold label + ≥1 model claim). `gold_text_wrong_position`: some claim has exact gold `text` but no claim has gold `position_in_source` — very common when **gold positions are document-level** while each eval row is a **single-sentence `input`**, so the model invents a local index (1, 2, …) that cannot match the label. `gold_position_wrong_text`: some claim matches gold position but not gold text (often paraphrase; see EXTRACTION_SYSTEM). `split_across_claims`: exact text on one claim and gold position on another.

mismatchSamples.goldText: The Christian faith benefits from a profound engagement with philosophy and science.
